title: HTML
subTitle: Structuring web applications with standards and SEO in mind
overviewContent: I structure web applications with HTML, paying careful attention to semantic elements, meta tags, and W3C standards for accessibility, maintainability, and SEO. I apply HTML best practices to deliver responsive, high-performance pages that support modern front-end frameworks, and I collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement markup precisely, improving search ranking and user experience across devices.
